name: SQL Server | Install (HA nodes)
description: Survey for deploy_sqlserver.yml when installing on HA cluster nodes. Use allowed_management_ip to include both node IPs for IPsec.

spec.question_description: SQL Server SA account password. Store the value securely in vault after use.
Windows disk number to format as E: (SQL data drive). Usually 1 for the extra disk added in provisioning.
Comma-separated IPs allowed through IPsec on ports 1433 and 3389. MUST include AWX IP (192.168.137.153) and both node IPs (192.168.137.170,192.168.137.171) for HA to work.
Create initial database after install. Required for AG enrollment in Phase 4.
Name for the initial database. This database will be added to the Availability Group.
